entry.title: IDC 36C10G19D0038 (P00044) awarded to TRIWEST HEALTHCARE ALLIANCE CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXERCISE OPTION YEAR 2 FOR THIS CONTRACT.IN ACCORDANCE WITH FAR 52.217-9, THE GOVERNMENT EXERCISES ITS OPTION TO EXTEND THE TERM OF THIS CONTRACT. THE POP IS EXTENDED FROM APRIL 1, 2021 THROUGH MARCH 31, 2022.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DIRECT HEALTH AND MEDICAL INSURANCE CARRIERS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC 36C10G19D0038 (P00045) awarded to TRIWEST HEALTHCARE ALLIANCE CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS ADD RECURRING COVID REPORTING TO THE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:contingencyHumanitarianPeacekeepingO.description: PRESIDENTIAL ISSUED EMERGENCY DECLARATION, OR A MAJOR DISASTER DECLARATION
